original_hypothesis.title: Thenian reserveNFTs Increments reservedAmount Even When Minting Skipped at MAX_SUPPLY
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: reserveNFTs increments reservedAmount by _amount AFTER the loop, regardless of how many NFTs were actually minted (the loop skips minting when totalSupply() >= MAX_SUPPLY). This means reservedAmount can reach MAX_RESERVE even if most reserve slots were wasted, permanently consuming the reserve allocation without corresponding NFT mints.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The loop has `if (totalSupply() < MAX_SUPPLY)` check inside, but reservedAmount is incremented unconditionally outside the loop. If the owner calls reserveNFTs(addr, 150) when totalSupply is near MAX_SUPPLY, only a few NFTs mint but all 150 reserve slots are consumed.

proof_of_signal.pattern: reservedAmount = reservedAmount.add(_amount) is outside the for loop; loop body conditionally skips _safeMint but _amount still fully counted

preconditions: Owner calls reserveNFTs when totalSupply is close to MAX_SUPPLY

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: reservedAmount += _amount (always) vs actual mints (conditional per iteration)
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Reserve allocation consumed without corresponding NFT mints
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Fewer reserved NFTs than MAX_RESERVE intended; accounting error

economic_questions: How many NFTs can actually be reserved in edge cases?
Does this affect the overall NFT supply distribution?
validation_requirements: Test reserveNFTs with totalSupply near MAX_SUPPLY
Verify reservedAmount vs actual minted count

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: reservedAmount vs actual mints at boundary

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
